title: fix troubleshooting redirect instructions
body: The instructions in the troubleshooting.md aren't right and don't work. The container variable isn't in the right place.

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

:pushpin: Commit 13121be has been approved by `TomSweeneyRedHat`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=TomSweeneyRedHat 13121bee038c1663cb6c52cf4ead9c3949ee8d3c -->
I'm not sure why tests fail, is there something I need to do on my side?  I didn't bother building as it was just a markdown doc update - I assumed no automated test ran on it.
I am going to force merge, since this is not failing any tests.
